prompt:
[Person] Refer to Image 1 and Image 2.

[Pose and Expression]

Standing in a hot air balloon basket, naturally turning the body diagonally to look far to the left. One hand rests lightly on the inside of the basket's railing, looking into the distance with a calm, subtle, and wistful expression as if enjoying the fresh early morning air.

[Attire]

A cozy, soft-textured drop-shoulder ivory round-neck knit sweater. Silver sparkling beads and tassel decorations along the right bottom slit of the sweater provide a glamorous point, paired with clean white pants. Simple mini earrings are worn.

[Hair and Makeup]

A calm, bright medium long hair with natural volume. The hair flows naturally over the shoulders and front without special styling, lightly swaying in the morning breeze. The makeup is very clear and natural, matching the soft morning sunlight with transparent skin expression and calm nude-toned lips. Clean black nail art is on the fingernails.

[Lighting]

Soft, warm natural sunlight from the late dawn, rising low near the horizon just after sunrise, shines from the left. This subtle morning sun transparently illuminates the cozy surface texture of the ivory sweater and creates soft shadows along the right cheek and shoulder line, adding three-dimensionality.

[Texture and Color Mood]

Overall, tone-on-tone clothing of soft white, cream, and beige colors harmonizes with the pastel-toned morning sky to create a peaceful and romantic mood. The dense, soft wool texture of the knit contrasts with the rough rattan weave of the basket and the brilliant crystal bead textures at the bottom.

[Technical Specs]

Shot using an f/4.0 aperture, 1/500s shutter speed, ISO 100, and a 28mm wide-angle lens. A front eye-level angle capturing the person up to the thighs inside the basket while balancing the vast land and sky behind. Focus is on the subject, while the deep depth of field captures the distant rock formations and numerous balloons clearly.

[Background]

A vast panoramic view of Cappadocia with exotic rock formations and canyons. In the clear blue morning sky with orange sunrise afterglow, dozens of hot air balloons of various colors and patterns float leisurely, creating a fairy-tale landscape.

[Signature] A small Threads logo in the bottom right, with "CHAse" written in small white cursive above it like a signature.
